colors.name: Primary Green (Fresh Crops)
colors.use_case: Main call-to-action buttons, active navigation states, and branding headers.

colors.name: Deep Green (Foliage/Vigor)
colors.use_case: Primary text labels, active icons, and high-emphasis data metrics.

colors.name: Harvest Gold (Sun/Maturity)
colors.use_case: Notifications, warning alerts, pending tasks, and highlighted data points.

colors.name: Soil Brown (Earth/Roots)
colors.use_case: Secondary buttons, card borders, and warm accent elements.

colors.name: Crisp Off-White
colors.use_case: Main application background, data tables, and card backgrounds to ensure readability.
